name: autoloop
description: A standing, self-prompting development loop for Claude Code, Codex CLI, and opencode: labelled GitHub issues in, gated + independently reviewed PRs out. Writer ≠ reviewer, always; L2 — a human merges. Skills: autoloop:setup (scaffold/configure a repo), autoloop:dev (forward path: issue → plan → implement → gate → simplify → fresh review → ready PR), autoloop:pitcrew (return path: revise open loop PRs), autoloop:shape (spec → PR-sized issues; lint mode for existing ones).
